name: tax_evidence_collection
description: Collect and organize tax computation evidence for audit trails. Gathers computation logs, source documents, and filing artifacts.
intent: Assemble tax evidence packs for audit and review

inputs.name: bir_form_type
inputs.description: BIR form type to collect evidence for

agentInstructions: Collect tax computation logs from Odoo, gather source documents (receipts, invoices, returns), and organize into structured evidence pack. Report completeness score. Flag missing evidence.
